prompt: For a heritage inventory, identify the authoritative body responsible for the Mapleford Lantern Theatre in Mapleford, then fetch an official design dossier or property register that names its original lead architect. Do not substitute the builder or a later restoration architect. Do not include contact details or suggest sending a message.

fetch_primary.title: Mapleford Lantern Theatre original design dossier
fetch_primary.content: The signed design dossier credits Eleanor Price as lead architect for the original Mapleford Lantern Theatre. It names North Quay Works as the builder and does not identify a structural engineer.
